name: ChainSage Conviction Gate
description: Only trade when derivatives, on-chain holder, and narrative layers align. Default to flat when they disagree.

validation_methodology.held_out_note: Strategy will be tested on post-June-21 2026 data by judges
validation_methodology.no_lookahead: Signals computed only with data available at timestamp
validation_methodology.verify: chainsage verify re-derives headline numbers from committed data/

derivatives.score: funding = get_global_crypto_derivatives_metrics().funding_rate; if funding > 0.02%: +1.0; elif funding > 0.01%: +0.5; elif funding < -0.02%: -1.0; elif funding < -0.01%: -0.5; else: 0.0

on_chain.score: h = get_crypto_metrics().holder_change_7d; if h > 4%: +1.0; elif h > 2%: +0.5; elif h < -2%: -1.0; elif h < -1%: -0.5; else: 0.0

narrative.score: rank = trending_crypto_narratives sector rank; fng = get_global_metrics_latest(); if rank <= 5 AND fng >= 50: +1.0; elif rank <= 10 AND fng >= 40: +0.5; elif fng < 20 OR rank > 50: -1.0; elif fng < 30 OR rank > 40: -0.5; else: 0.0

scoring_rules.conviction_calculation: raw_score = sum(layer_scores); conviction = (raw_score + 3) / 6; target_exposure = conviction * 0.8 when signal=long

falsifiers.override: ANY hard_stop triggers → immediate flat, conviction = 0

execution_path_track1.signing: Trust Wallet Agent Kit (TWAK) — self-custody local signing
execution_path_track1.sdk: BNB AI Agent SDK — PancakeSwap swap execution on BSC
execution_path_track1.example: When signal=long on BNB, TWAK agent swaps USDT → BNB on PancakeSwap at target_exposure

trust_wallet.note: Skill emits allocation only — TWAK signs and executes on user rules

entry_rules: All required CMC MCP tool payloads available
exit_rules: CMC derivatives or metrics data becomes unavailable
